title: euphorbia officinarum subsp. officinarum
intro: Euphorbia officinarum subsp. officinarum, also known as the candelabra tree or dragon's blood tree, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family, native to Madagascar. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Euphorbia officinarum subsp. officinarum include its use in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal remedy through various methods, including boiling the roots and stems to create a decoction or infusing the plant in oil to create a topical treatment.
